{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 5.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-1188", "name": "Initialization of a Resource with an Insecure Default"}], "description": "The python API made a restrictive-looking configuration unsafe by default. A caller could configure only reverse-
proxy credential routes, put the child in CapabilitySet.proxy_only, and reasonably expect network access to be limited
to those routes. Instead, because empty allowed_hosts meant allow-all inside nono-proxy, the child could use the local
proxy as a transparent CONNECT tunnel to non-route nominated hosts (not including metadata endpoints).

That is an authorization bypass / policy confusion issue:

- Intended policy: route-only proxy access.
- Actual policy: route-only plus arbitrary transparent CONNECT.
- Boundary crossed: sandboxed child gains broader outbound network reach than the Python policy appears to grant.
- Impact depends on environment, but it can allow exfiltration or access to unintended internet/internal services
  through the unsandboxed proxy.

This should be classified as medium severity by default, potentially high if users rely on route-only configs for strict egress
control around untrusted code or sensitive credentials. The fix is security-relevant because it changes the default from
implicit allow-all to explicit opt-in.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9j7f-3r4p-pwh6", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-26T20:39:43Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9j7f-3r4p-pwh6", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9j7f-3r4p-pwh6"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-26T20:39:43Z", "references": ["https://github.com/always-further/nono-py/security/advisories/GHSA-9j7f-3r4p-pwh6", "https://github.com/nolabs-ai/nono-py/commit/163fca083a189967b882d1005bfba099fc9a9d63", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9j7f-3r4p-pwh6"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nolabs-ai/nono-py/security-advisories/GHSA-9j7f-3r4p-pwh6", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/always-further/nono-py", "summary": "nono-py vulnerable to authorization bypass / policy confusion", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-26T20:39:45Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9j7f-3r4p-pwh6", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.11.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "nono-py"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.10.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: nono-py vulnerable to authorization bypass / policy confusion
